telemetry_readiness.summary: Decision, event, and match telemetry now support observed outcome enrichment and offline rollout reconstruction when full pre-action state_raw is present.

export_readiness.summary: Chunked candidate-action export works with observed outcome columns by default, schema output, manifest output, and quality reporting.

rollout_readiness.summary: Offline forced-action rollout infrastructure exists, validates legality, writes resumable JSONL results, and produces quality artifacts. Large bounded samples can exceed the current command timeout window during interactive validation.

training_readiness.summary: Backward-compatible imitation training was validated end to end. Observed-outcome and rollout objectives are implemented, but bounded interactive validation did not complete a rollout-target training run because the bounded export slice did not overlap the rollout sample.

runtime_provider_readiness.summary: The LightGBM runtime path now records richer model metadata and score diagnostics and falls back safely on non-finite or mismatched scores.

evaluation_readiness.summary: The evaluation harness writes machine-readable reports, supports heuristic sanity baselines, mirrored seating, and a pass/fail improvement gate. The current checked-in LightGBM model does not pass the new gate.

gate_fail_reasons: fallback count increased from 2 to 52 in the bounded run
challenger latency unavailable because decisions fell back to local heuristic

classification.truthful_label: The repo is now rollout and counterfactual strategy-ready, but the currently checked-in model is not strategy-improvement validated.

risks: The shipped LightGBM model still falls back heavily and fails the new evaluation gate.
Rollout training was implemented but not fully smoke-trained end to end on a matching export slice during this bounded interactive run.
Large rollout batches can exceed interactive command timeouts even when the output file is progressing.
remaining_gaps: Run a matched export plus rollout-target training job on the same sampled decisions and store the resulting rollout-regression or ranker report.
Train a fresh candidate model that passes the evaluation gate before promoting it to the runtime model registry.
Consider adding explicit export filters for decision_id, game_id, or descending/recent ordering to make bounded rollout-validation loops cheaper.
